title: Combined miRNA-piRNA signature in serum and urine of rabbits infected with Toxoplasma gondii
author: Xie, Shi-Chen
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Fig. 4 First nucleotide bias of obtained small RNA in urine samples of rabbits. a First nucleotide bias of known miRNAs in rabbit urine. b First nucleotide bias of predicted miRNAs in rabbit urine. c First nucleotide bias of predicted piRNAs in rabbit urine
